title: Gantt Chart with Critical Path Highlighted
description: Interactive vis-timeline Gantt chart of a 12-week CRM rollout with critical path highlighted in magenta, non-critical tasks in emerald, and slack visualized as a faint coral region. Tasks are draggable, and the project finish status updates live.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Information Systems
Project Management
Critical Path Method
learningObjectives: Read a Gantt chart and identify task durations and dependencies
Distinguish critical-path tasks from non-critical tasks
Predict the schedule effect of moving any task
Explain why slack matters and where to find resources to compress the critical path
assumptions: Critical path is fixed for color coding (does not recompute on drag)
limitations: Dragging individual tasks does not recompute the critical path
Dependencies are illustrated through swim lanes rather than arrows
